title: Amtech S0654 180cm (72") Bungee cords (2 pack)
features: UP TO 50% EXTENSION: This pack of two 180cm (72"), heavy duty, 12mm diameter bungee cords can extend up to 50% and are perfect for tarpaulins, cars, trucks, trailers, bikes, boats and motorcycles
NON-SCRATCH HOOKS: The cords have strong metal hooks with rubber stops to prevent scratching
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 2x Bungee See more
